# Unicode Content

## Chinese Characters

你好世界 (Hello World in Chinese)

## Japanese

日本語のテキスト (Japanese text)

## Arabic

مرحبا بالعالم (Hello World in Arabic)

## Russian

Привет мир (Hello World in Russian)

## Symbols

Mathematical: α β γ δ ε ∑ ∏ ∫ ∞

Arrows: → ← ↑ ↓ ↔ ⇒ ⇐

Currency: $ € £ ¥ ₹ ₽
